summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RetailIQ application - Backend APIs working perfectly, Frontend partially working with some navigation issues

ui_bugs.issue: Store page (/store) redirects back to Dashboard instead of showing products
ui_bugs.selector: Navigation from dashboard or direct URL access

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access store page to test Cart and Buy Now buttons

passed_tests: Backend API - Config returns INR currency (₹)
Backend API - Dashboard stats show revenue in INR (₹447,482.00)
Backend API - Products list with INR prices (₹2,999.00)
Backend API - Cart operations with INR pricing
Backend API - Order creation with COD (status: confirmed, payment_status: cod)
Backend API - Order status updates (pending → confirmed → shipped → delivered)
Backend API - Orders list with status timeline
Frontend - Dashboard shows revenue in INR format (₹4,50,481.00)
Frontend - Dashboard displays 9 INR currency values
Frontend - Navigation menu visible with all admin sections
Frontend - Revenue trend chart showing INR values
Frontend - Top Products showing INR prices (₹1,55,988.00, ₹89,982.00, ₹80,982.00)
Frontend - No error messages on dashboard
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Store page routing issue - /store URL redirects to Dashboard instead of showing products with Cart and Buy Now buttons. This prevents testing of the customer-facing store interface, cart functionality, and order placement flow.

success_percentage.frontend: 70% (Dashboard working perfectly, Store page navigation broken)
